expectations.text: Creates exactly one TeamCreate with tfx- prefix naming

expectations.evidence: Agent output: 'Three TaskCreate calls (one per subtask), preserving taskIds'

expectations.text: Spawns 3 Agent wrappers with mode: bypassPermissions
expectations.evidence: Agent output: 'mode: bypassPermissions — included in all 3 Agent calls. Mandatory.'

expectations.text: Uses tfx-route.sh inside Agent wrapper (not direct codex/gemini)
expectations.evidence: Agent output: 'all wrappers internally call bash ~/.claude/scripts/tfx-route.sh — never direct codex exec or gemini -y -p'
Agent output: 'TeamDelete is called unconditionally (success or failure), with 30-second wait'
